name: Crockpot Peppered Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 each POTATOES, PEELED & IN FINE CUTS
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE ALL LOAF INGREDIENTS EXCEPT POTATOES AND SAUCE INGREDIENTS.
2. MIX WELL AND SHAPE INTO A LOAF.
3. PLACE POTATOES IN BOTTOM OF CROCK POT.
4. TOP POTATOES WITH MEAT LOAF.
5. POUR SAUCE OVER ALL.
6. COVER AND COOK ON LOW FOR 8 TO 12 HOURS.
